blended.narrative: Sunday River is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,995 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 63°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
